title: Nextracker Announces Pricing of Offering of Class A Common Stock
text: AUSTIN, Texas, June 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — Flex Ltd. (Nasdaq: FLEX) announced today that its subsidiary, Nextracker Inc. (“Nextracker”), priced its underwritten offering of 14,210,511 shares of Nextracker’s Class A common stock (“Common Stock”) offered by Nextracker and 2,289,489 shares of Common Stock offered by certain stockholders of Nextracker at an offering price of $36.50 […]...
